title: Let's Explore the City! Game Zone
source: Generated from approved unit runtime and linked master dictionary

games.title: Meaning Match
games.description: Match each unit word to its approved child-friendly meaning.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: A building where books are kept to read or borrow.
rounds.explanation: library: A building where books are kept to read or borrow.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: An aircraft that can fly straight up and hover.
rounds.explanation: helicopter: An aircraft that can fly straight up and hover.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: A reptile with a hard shell.
rounds.explanation: turtle: A reptile with a hard shell.

games.title: Spelling Builder
games.description: Choose letter tiles to build important unit words.

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: A train that runs below the city streets.

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: A drawing that shows where places are.

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.

games.title: Sentence Puzzle
games.description: Put unit words into the correct sentence order.

rounds.prompt: Build the complete model sentence.
rounds.answer: I go to the library to borrow books.

rounds.prompt: Build the complete model sentence.
rounds.answer: We took the ferry across the river.

rounds.prompt: Build the complete model sentence.
rounds.answer: We saw the city from a helicopter.

games.title: Language Choice
games.description: Choose the form that makes the unit language accurate.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: The many cars and vehicles moving on the roads.
rounds.explanation: traffic: The many cars and vehicles moving on the roads. There is a lot of traffic in the city center.

rounds.prompt: What type of word is 'helicopter'?
rounds.explanation: helicopter: An aircraft that can fly straight up and hover. We saw the city from a helicopter.

rounds.prompt: We take the ____ to school every morning.
rounds.explanation: bus: A large vehicle that carries many people. We take the bus to school every morning.

games.title: Reading Detective
games.description: Use unit evidence to solve each reading clue.

rounds.prompt: What type of word is 'underground'?
rounds.explanation: We took the underground to the museum.

rounds.prompt: We took the ____ across the river.
rounds.explanation: We took the ferry across the river.

rounds.prompt: Which spelling is correct?
rounds.explanation: We saw the whole city from the Ferris wheel.

games.title: Speaking Quest
games.description: Listen, record, review and submit useful unit language.

rounds.prompt: Speaking 1 — Talk About City Places
Speaking Game — Mystery Animal
rounds.target: I am thinking of an animal. It is ______ and ______.

rounds.prompt: Speaking 5 - Aquarium Expert
rounds.target: Describe three sea animals and state two true facts about each.

games.title: Word Order Race
games.description: Arrange unit language in a clear, accurate order.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: Walk straight ahead to the traffic light.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: The turtle pulled its head into its shell.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.

games.title: Definition Dash
games.description: Choose the approved meaning before moving to the next clue.

rounds.prompt: What does 'map' mean in this unit?
choices: A drawing that shows where places are.
A building where books are kept to read or borrow.
A large building with many shops inside.
rounds.answer: A drawing that shows where places are.
rounds.explanation: map: A drawing that shows where places are.

rounds.prompt: What does 'amazing' mean in this unit?
choices: A building where books are kept to read or borrow.
A large building with many shops inside.
rounds.explanation: amazing: Very impressive or surprising.

rounds.prompt: What does 'shopping center' mean in this unit?
choices: A boat that carries people across water.
A large building with many shops inside.
A building where books are kept to read or borrow.
rounds.answer: A large building with many shops inside.
rounds.explanation: shopping center: A large building with many shops inside.

games.title: Word Type Power
games.description: Identify how each vocabulary word works in English.

rounds.prompt: What type of word is 'octopus'?
rounds.explanation: octopus is used as a noun in this dictionary sense.

rounds.prompt: What type of word is 'huge'?
rounds.explanation: huge is used as a adjective in this dictionary sense.

rounds.prompt: What type of word is 'market'?
rounds.explanation: market is used as a noun in this dictionary sense.

games.title: Memory Pairs
games.description: Reveal tiles and connect each word with its meaning.

rounds.prompt: Match vocabulary set 1.
pairs: A train that runs below the city streets.
A big wheel at a park that you ride for fun.
An aircraft that can fly straight up and hover.

rounds.prompt: Match vocabulary set 2.
pairs: A drawing that shows where places are.
A building where sea animals are kept for people to see.
A black-and-white bird that swims but cannot fly.

rounds.prompt: Match vocabulary set 3.

games.title: Question Quest
games.description: Read each unit question carefully and choose the best answer.

rounds.prompt: We took the ____ across the river.
rounds.explanation: We took the ferry across the river.

rounds.prompt: Which spelling is correct?
rounds.explanation: We saw the whole city from the Ferris wheel.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: A busy place where people buy and sell things.
rounds.explanation: market: A busy place where people buy and sell things. Mum buys fruit and fish at the market.

games.title: Unit Mission
games.description: Finish with a mixed challenge across the whole unit.

rounds.prompt: What does 'library' mean?
choices: A building where books are kept to read or borrow.
A large building with many shops inside.
A train that runs below the city streets.
A boat that carries people across water.
rounds.answer: A building where books are kept to read or borrow.
rounds.explanation: I go to the library to borrow books.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: A large building with many shops inside.
rounds.explanation: We bought new clothes at the shopping center.

rounds.prompt: What type of word is 'underground'?
rounds.explanation: We took the underground to the museum.
